name: Caspian
description: Caspian channel plugin — one agent identity across every channel Caspian connects.

apiKey.description: Caspian gateway API key. Falls back to the COMM_API_KEY environment variable.

baseUrl.description: Caspian gateway base URL. Falls back to COMM_BASE_URL, then the caspian-sdk default.

displayName.description: Display name the agent posts under on channels that support per-agent branding.

channels.description: Optional allowlist of Caspian sub-channels (e.g. slack, whatsapp) to dispatch inbound from. Omit for all connected channels.

allowFrom.description: Optional DM allowlist of sender ids permitted to reach the agent.
